calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Amended Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

J. Brian McCauley; J. Brian McCauley, APC; 415-974-1515; appearing via Zoom on behalf of petitioners George Leow, Joseph Mallon, Andrew Lusardi, Jane Freston, Florence Suratt and Martin Miller.
Alice M. Traeg; respondent, in pro per; appearing in person on their own behalf.

Respondent Alice Traeg contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PETITIONERS GEORGE LOEW, ANDREW LUSARDI, JOSEPH MALLON, JANE FRESTON, FLORENCE SURATT AND MARTIN MILLER'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitrtation Award And For Entry Of Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jul-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON is OFF CALENDAR. Amended Petition on file. Petitioner to set a hearing based on the Amended Petition to Confirm Arbitration. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
